- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Project type: React app with Vite, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion. Romantic birthday website with multiple sections.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Used create_new_workspace tool to get setup info for Vite, then ran npx create-vite@latest . --template react to create the project structure.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Installed Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion. Created components: Hero, Message, Timeline, Surprise, Reasons, Final. Modified App.jsx to use them. Added interactive elements and animations.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions needed for this project.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Dev server runs successfully. Build has PostCSS issue with source-map-js, but functionality is intact.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	No custom tasks needed.

- [x] Launch the Project
	Dev server is running at http://localhost:5173/

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md exists. Copilot-instructions.md updated with progress.

Work through each checklist item systematically.
Keep communication concise and focused.
Follow development best practices.
